scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,server,client -c yellow,green,blue "npm run dev --workspace @acatgame/game-core" "npm run dev --workspace @acatgame/server" "npm run dev --workspace @acatgame/client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @acatgame/game-core && npm run build --workspace @acatgame/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @acatgame/client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @acatgame/game-core && npm run test --workspace @acatgame/server
